front.title: Auto-Deletion of Unused TE Tunnels Using a Timer-Based Mechanism

abstract.t:
This document describes a timer-based mechanism for handling unused Traffic Engineering (TE) tunnels.
When a tunnel remains inactive for a configured period, it is moved to a parked state, administratively shut down, and the associated resources are released.
If the tunnel remains parked beyond a longer retention interval, it may be deleted automatically or removed through operator action, depending on local policy.
This approach improves resource utilization and provides a structured lifecycle for unused TE tunnels.
